description_long: This factory building features a large, flat, dark green roof that extends well beyond the perimeter of the main structure, providing significant coverage. The main building beneath the roof is a rectangular block with a dark, almost black exterior and a lighter gray base, suggesting a concrete or steel construction. The structure appears windowless and utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or architectural embellishments. The roof is supported by a central core, possibly housing internal support columns or machinery, but no external smokestacks or rooftop equipment are visible. The overall design is boxy and functional, typical of modern industrial facilities. The absence of visible doors, windows, or loading docks suggests a minimalist, highly secure exterior.
description: A boxy, modern industrial factory building with a large, flat green roof and a dark, windowless exterior. The structure is utilitarian and lacks visible doors, windows, or rooftop machinery.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, overhanging green roof and the dark, rectangular main building with a lighter base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the uniformity of the roof and the solid, dark exterior walls with no visible openings.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the same overhanging roof and blocky structure, with a slight hint of internal support but no external features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, emphasizing the building's symmetry and lack of external details.
